description: Specialist software engineer focusing on server-side logic, database management, security integration, performance tuning, and API design.

junior.expectations: Focus on database CRUD writing, implementing simple API endpoints, debugging logic errors, and querying data sets.

mid.expectations: Optimize database schemas and SQL query plans, build secure multi-service transaction logic, write unit tests, and integrate cache buffers.

senior.expectations: Architect microservices topology, design high-throughput cache topologies, manage asynchronous workers, and review query indexes.
